title: cistus × santae
intro: Cistus × santae, a hybrid of the cistus plant species, is a flowering shrub known for its fragrant white flowers and drought-tolerant properties. The medicinal properties of Cistus × santae lie in its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to offer health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. Cistus × santae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
